creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
Thank you very much for confirming!

I hope it is okay for you to use FreeBSD with SC console and without KMS driver, as it seems to work fine this way.
If this is the case, I think we can consider the issue as kind of "solved" now...

If you absolutely need vt newcons or drm-kmod, I only can say that both of these cause a lot of problems for me, too. (just search for "vt newcons" or "drm-kmod" to see all the issues I had to report recently due to my intensive testing with many different configurations)

Aside of these "peanuts", FreeBSD is a great system!
I hope you will enjoy FreeBSD too :)
